testcase.name: test_invalid_category_no_500
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration7.py:151: in test_invalid_category_no_500 assert it.get("category") in TECHNICAL_IC E AssertionError: assert 'business' in {'data', 'hardware', 'infra', 'ml', 'robotics', 'security', ...} E + where 'business' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaaa021cbf40>('category') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaaa021cbf40> = {'category': 'business', 'city': 'San Francisco', 'company_color': '#00FFCC', 'company_id': 'co_46f7179167', ...}.get
